_provenance: Schema-derived from AC-P2.4.4. Account with ONE symphony: port is mathematically equivalent to that symphony, but result must be flagged port_mode=True for telemetry consistency.
description: Single symphony: aggregated values match symphony directly, but port_mode flag is True.

derivations.all_fields: Single-symphony: weight=1.0; all value-weighted fields pass through unchanged from the only symphony.
derivations.port_mode: AC-P2.4.4: single-symphony port is flagged port-mode for downstream telemetry consistency, no behavior difference.
